title: matthiola fruticulosa var. coronopifolia
intro: Matthiola fruticulosa var. coronopifolia, also known as the Small Stock or Stock, is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Matthiola fruticulosa var. coronopifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusion of the flowers or leaves in hot water, which can be used to make teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
